title: sambucus glabrescens
intro: Sambucus glabrescens, also known as the American elder, is a shrub-like plant native to North America, belonging to the Adoxaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiviral properties, which can help to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and combat the common cold. The health benefits of Sambucus glabrescens include boosting the immune system, reducing congestion, and alleviating symptoms of allergies. Sambucus glabrescens can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, tinctures, and syrups, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
